concerns.text: In the Abstract, the repository URL sentence contains redundant and contradictory text: '...CiteVQA (code will be made publicly available upon publication) (code archived and provided as supplementary material)'. This must be consolidated into a single, clear statement regarding availability.

In Section 5 (Evaluation), the sentence 'Owing to space limitations, their formal definitions and detailed evaluation results are deferred to the Appendix~\ref{Appendix: More Evaluation Metrics} and~\ref{Appendix: More Results of Experiments} .' contains a trailing space before the period. Remove the space.

In Section 6 (Analysis & Discussion), the paragraph 'Synergy between Attribution and Accuracy' contains a commented-out LaTeX line '% Here we further explore...' that should be removed to maintain clean source code.

In the Appendix, Section 'Limitations & Potential Negative Impacts', the label is defined as '\label{appenidx: Limitations}' (typo: 'appenidx'). This should be corrected to '\label{appendix: Limitations}' to match the section title and ensure consistent cross-referencing.

In the Appendix, Section 'Prompt Templates', the label for the prompt evaluation prompt is '\label{Prompts for CiteVQA Pipeline}' but the section title is 'Prompts for CiteVQA Evaluation'. Ensure labels and titles are consistent, and check for the typo 'Evluation' in the prompt title 'Prompt for Annotation Evluation'.
